title: stevia ovata var. reglensis
intro: Stevia ovata var. reglensis, also known as Stevia, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to South America. It is used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent. Stevia has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving oral health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
